label: USER MENU BUTTON NOT FOUND
detail: No element with both [data-menu] and [aria-haspopup] found. This is required by density-dark-mode.js watchForMenu(). May indicate the APEX app is not using Universal Theme nav bar, or the user avatar nav item has a different structure.

label: DARK TOGGLE NOT INJECTED
detail: density-dark-mode.js did not inject #ds-dark-mode-toggle-item after menu open. Likely cause: JS file not loaded in this app, or ul[role='group'] selector not matching the APEX version's menu structure.

label: DARK TOGGLE CLICK HANDLER FAILED
detail: JS click on #ds-dark-mode-toggle-item did not toggle body.ds-dark. Check the click event listener in density-dark-mode.js.

label: LOCALSTORAGE NOT SET
detail: Expected 'on', got None. Dark mode will not persist across pages.

label: DARK MODE NOT PERSISTED AFTER RELOAD
detail: body.ds-dark not present after reload. applyPreference() in density-dark-mode.js may not be firing early enough, or the JS file is not loaded on this page.

label: IR TABLE NOT LOCATABLE
detail: Could not find .a-IRR-table on pages 1, 2, or via card nav. Try navigating manually to the Interactive Report page.
